name: Southern Soft-Shell Tacos
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rice according to package directions.
2. Heat the chili according to package directions.
3. Fill each tortilla with an equal amount of cooked rice, heated chili, salsa, and shredded cheese.
4. Fold the sides of the tortillas over to close them.
5. Serve with sour cream and shredded lettuce on top.
